items.text: Cybersecurity incidents, threats and attacks are increasingly sophisticated, including due to advances in artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities, constantly evolving, and originate from many sources globally.
items.rationale: Adds specific detail (AI-driven sophistication) to the existing cybersecurity threat risk rather than introducing a wholly new risk.

items.text: In addition, often these incidents cannot be recognized or understood until the target has already been attacked.
items.rationale: General cautionary statement about the difficulty of recognizing attacks, a common elaboration that doesn't add a distinct new risk.

items.text: If we are unable to attract, retain, develop and progress a qualified global workforce, this could adversely affect our business and future success and impair our ability to meet our strategic objectives and the needs of our customers.
items.rationale: Generic workforce attraction/retention risk language typical of many filings, not a specific new threat.

items.text: In October 2025, we completed our acquisition of Suvinil, a leading provider of architectural paints in Brazil, with annual sales of approximately $525 million.
items.rationale: Discloses a specific recent acquisition (Suvinil) with financial scale, introducing new integration and business risk not previously present.

items.text: Our business benefits from free trade agreements, including the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement and EU-UK Trade and Cooperation Agreement.
items.rationale: Introduces reliance on specific trade agreements, implying a new exposure to potential changes in these agreements that wasn't previously disclosed.
